MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alan Sherwood, Esq. of T:510.409.6199, specially appearing for plaintiff/moving party;
Kimberly Dougherty, T:415.504.0920, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, as follows:

Portfolio Recovery Associates, LLC's motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted; no opposition filed.

Order and Judgment were signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
